citation.description: Codebase-verifiable criterion but requires live HTTP call. Operator comment in ticket attests: 'PyPI: nava-rebar 0.8.0 served (HTTP 200), now latest (https://pypi.org/project/nava-rebar/0.8.0/).' This is corroborated by all version manifests correctly set to 0.8.0, the release workflow having run to completion, and the concrete URL provided.
